text.title: Rust Testing Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure: detect layout → install llvm-cov → wire CI → write tests → set proptest budget.

step.name: detect-layout
step.action: Run `cargo metadata --format-version=1 | jq .packages[0].targets`. Identify whether crate has `[lib]`, `[[bin]]`, and existing `tests/` dir.

step.name: install-llvm-cov
step.action: Add to CI: `cargo install --locked cargo-llvm-cov`. Verify with `cargo llvm-cov --version`.

step.name: wire-ci
step.action: Copy `templates/rust-coverage-gate.sh` into the workflow. Run `cargo test --all-targets --doc` then `cargo llvm-cov --lcov --output-path lcov.info` then `diff-cover lcov.info --compare-branch=origin/main --fail-under=85`.

step.name: write-tests
step.input: list of public fn / data structures without coverage
step.action: For each: add a `# Examples` doc block, an integration test under `tests/`, and (if parser/codec) a `proptest!` block with size-bounded strategies.
step.decision-gate: If proptest cases exceed 1024 and CI takes >5 min — cap at 256 in CI, run 4096 nightly with a separate cron workflow.

step.name: lock
step.action: Emit test-strategy spec JSON per 02-output-contract.xml. Commit. Future PRs run against the locked gate.
